description_text: Product Description 4Pcs ABS Carbon Fiber Car Rear Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Curved Spoiler Lip Wing Splitter Universal Car SUV Rear Bumper Diffuser Molding Shark Fin Spoiler Protector Cover Anti-crash and anti wear. 100% Brand new and high quality. Quantity: 4Pcs Type：Curved Protect your car from damage Easy to install Long service life and durability Practical and beautiful Colour:Carbon Fiber Material:ABS Size:15*3*5CM Package Contents: 4*Rear Bumper Spoiler 1* Roll double-sided adhesive tape 16*Screws Payment Returns Contact Us Shipping We accept payment by PayPal only ! Payment should be completed within 5 days after buyer places the order,or else an unpaid case will be opened in order to cancel the transaction. If you can not pay in time, please contact us. e-check from PayPal will only be processed once the payment clears. All of the items will be shipped to buyer's EBAY address,please confirm your address on Ebay before you buy.Your order will be usually shipped out the same or next business days once the payment is made and cleared. Welcome to our Store ~
